introduction: Based on true events, the movie centers on a deadly love triangle that led authorities on an international manhunt.When pro-cyclist Moriah Wilson is found dead after a short-lived affair with fellow professional Colin Strickland, all signs point to Texan yoga teacher and Strickland’s on-and-off girlfriend, Kaitlin Armstrong. After being accused of allegedly killing Wilson in a jealous rage, she vanishes into thin air. On the run, Kaitlin alters her appearance in attempts to elude the authorities as they work to track her down, leading them to places that they never expected to find her.
